verses.text: Judea gam panin Antiok khua-ah mi pawlkhat hong pai uh a, innkuan khat bangin a om thu um mite kiangah, “Moses Thukham sungah a kigen bangin na vun uh na at kei uh leh hotkhiatna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding hong kipan uh hi

Hih thu huhau-in Paul leh Barnabas, leh hih mite kikalah nakpi takin thu kinialna omin thu kisel uh ahih manin, Paul leh Barnabas leh Antiok khua-a a om mi pawlkhatte Jerusalem khua-ah va pai-in, hih thu tawh kisai-in tua lai-a om sawltakte leh upate tawh a kimuhna dingun a vaihawm uh hi

Amaute a pai uh ciangin pawlpi mite in khuanawl ciang va kha uh a, Gentail mite zong Pasian lamah a kiheina thu, a nawkna uh Foenisia gamah gen kawikawi uh ahih manin thu um mite khempeuh a nuam mahmah uh hi
Jerusalem khua a tun' uh ciangin sawltakte, upate, leh pawlpite in limtakin zin na do uh a, Pasian in na a seppihna thu, amaute kiangah a gen uh hi
Ahi zongin Farisi mite sung panin thu um mi pawlkhat in, “Amaute in Moses Thukham zui-in, a vun uh a ki-atna ding uh gen ding kisam hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin hih thu a kikum dingin sawltakte leh upate a kikhawm uh hi

Sauveipi a kisel khit uh ciangin Peter hong ding a, “Lawmte aw, Gentail mite in Pasian' thu za-in a uptheihna dingun amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin sawtpi lai pekin note lak panin Pasian in kei hong teelkhiatna thu na thei uh hi
Mihingte' lungsim sungthu a thei Pasian in Gentail mite in zong thu a uptheih ding mah hi, cih a lahna-in eite tungah a hong piak mah bangin amaute tungah zong Kha Siangtho a pia hi
Pasian in eite leh Gentail mite deidanna hong neilo a, amaute in zong a up manun mi siangtho-in a bawl hi
Tua ahih ciangin i pute i pate-a kipan eimahmah in i puak zawhloh vangik pen Pasian' heh theihtheihna dingin bang hangin thu um mite tungah suan ding ihi hiam
Tua bangin i gamta het kei ding hi. Amaute mah bangin eite in zong i up manin Topa Jesuh hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna i ngah hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi
Tua ciangin Barnabas leh Paul in Gentail mite lakah amau tung tawnin Pasian in lim leh na lamdang a bawlnate khempeuh a gen laitakun mi khempeuh pauloin a om uh hi
A thugen uh a man khit ciangin James in thu hong gen a, “Lawmte aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un
Pasian in Gentail mite lak panin ama mi dingin mi pawlkhat a lakna tawh Gentail mite a kin ahih lamtak a hong lahna thu, Simon' genna i za zo hi
Kamsangte' thugente zong tu-a tawh kituak mahmah hi. Lai Siangtho sungah

‘Tanglai pek panin hih thu a hong theisak Topa in hih bangin a gen hi: Keima mi ahi dingin ka sapsa Gentail mite leh midangte khempeuh in Topa a zon'theihna dingun a nung ciangin ka hong paikik ding a, a kisiasa David' ukna gam ka puahkik ding hi. A siate a ngei bangsak kikin ka dingsak kik ding hi, ci hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi
Tua ahih ciangin keima ngaihsutna-ah, Pasian' lamah a kihei hih Gentail mite nawngkaisak lo zaw-in

milim biakna-a kizang an khempeuh a sianglo suak ahih manin a neklohna ding uh, numei tawh khialhnate panin a kikepna ding uh, a si luangkhiasak loin a kigawlmek sate, leh sasi khat peuhpeuh a neklohna dingun lai i gelhzawk ding hoih ka sa hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Sabbath nisimin kikhopna innte-ah Moses Thukhamte kisim ngitnget a, khua khempeuhah Moses thugente mah hilh belin kinei hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin sawltakte, upate, leh pawlpi buppi in amau sung panin mi pawlkhat teelin Paul leh Barnabas tawh Antiok khua-ah a paikhawmsak ding uh a vaihawm uh hi. Amaute tawh a paikhawm dingin thu um mite in a zahtakbawl mahmah mi nih, Barsabbas Judas leh Silas teelkhia uh a

a nuai-a kigelh bangin lai a puasak uh hi. Tua a lai puaksak uh sungah, “Sawltakte leh upate ahi ko na sanggamte un, Antiok khua, Syria gam, leh Silisia gama om thu upna sungah sanggam ahi Gentail mite tungah hopihna kam kong khak uh hi
Kote' hong sawllohpi-in ko kiang panin mi pawlkhat hong pai-in a thugenna uh tawh note hong buaisakin hong lung-amsak hi, ci-in ka za uh hi

Tua ahih manin kote kikhawmin thu ka kikum uh a, mi pawlkhat teelin no kiangah kong paisak ding uh ka kithukim uh hi. Tua ka teel uh mite pen i Topa Jesuh Khrih nasepna-ah a nuntakna uh a pia ngam i sanggam it Paul leh Barnabas tawh kong paisak uh hi
Tua ahih manin ka teel uh Judas leh Silas kong paisak uh a, hih lai sunga ka gelh uh thute mah amau kam mahmah tawh hong gen ding uh hi
A kisam mahmah hih a nuai-a thute simloh, note tungah vangik dang suatding pen Kha Siangtho leh kote ka thukim kei uh hi

Tua a kisam thute in: Milim biakna-in a kipiasa an khat peuhpeuh na neklohna ding uh, sasi na neklohna ding uh, a si luangkhiasak loin a kigawlmek sa khat peuhpeuh na neklohna ding uh, leh numei tawh khialhna panin na kikepna ding uh ahi hi. Hih thute hoihtakin zui le uh cin note-a' dingin hoih ding hi. Na cidam ta un,” ci-in kigelh hi
Tua bangin amaute paisak uh a, Antiok khua a tun' uh ciangin thu um mi khempeuh khawmin amaute tungah a lai puak uh a pia uh hi
Mite in tua laikhak a sim uh ciangin a thu kigelhte hangin amaute thanuamin lungdam mahmah uh hi
Judas leh Silas zong kamsangte mah hi uh a, thu um mite tawh sauveipi thu kikum uh a, amaute' lungsim thanuam sakin a thahatsak uh hi
Tua lai-ah tawlkhat a taam khit uh ciangin thu uppih lawmte in lungdam takin Judas leh Silas, amau a sawlte kiangah a ciahkik sak uh hi
Ahi zongin Antiok khua-ah Paul leh Barnabas taam lai uh a, midang tampite tawh kopin Topa' thu a hilh uh hi.
Tawlkhat khit ciangin Paul in Barnabas kiangah, “Topa' thu i hilhnasa khua tuamtuama i sanggamte kiangah va hawhkikin bang a cici uh hiam cih va en ni,” a ci hi
Tua bangin a pai ding uh ciangin Barnabas in Johan Marka tonpih nuam a
ahi zongin Johan Marka in a khualzin masakun a tawpdongin zui loin Pamfilia gam panin ciahsan ahih manin Paul in hoihsalo hi
Hih thu hangin amaute gel nakpi takin kinial uh ahih manin kikhenlawh uh a, Barnabas in Johan Marka zawnin Saipras tuikulh gam a zuan dingin teembaw tawh a pai hi
Paul in zong Silas teel a, thu um mite in Topa' khutsungah a ap khit uh ciangin
Syria gam leh Silisia gam nawkin pai-in pawlpite hanthawnin a thahatsak hi.
